productDisplayName: Nike Men Transform Black Sports Shoes
description: Style Note The nike Transform III shoe offers outstanding comfort and support for the demanding athlete. This lightweight shoe is for the runner who wants to make a statement without sacrificing comfort and performance. Product Details Canvas upper with synthetic overlays for enhanced durability Perforations on the forefoot for breathability Lace up system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue, collar and footbed for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection TPR outsole with flex grooves on the forefoot for ease of movement Waffle-pattern lugs for grip and traction Scooped heel for extra cushioning to the backfootWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Material and Care Canvas Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
